description: Render a clinical decision algorithm into a TikZ/LaTeX flowchart from a JSON spec (nodes: start/decision/action with yes/no targets and urgency styling), or generate the built-in example algorithm.
rules: read-only — reads one JSON spec, writes a single .tex under record_store
no SPEC_JSON (or empty) generates the built-in example chest-pain algorithm
output is clinical_algorithm.tex (TikZ); compile downstream with pdflatex
usage: Set SPEC_JSON (path to a decision-tree JSON spec; omit for the example). Output: clinical_algorithm.tex.
limitation: JSON layout is a simple vertical listing — complex trees may need manual TikZ positioning. Pure Python stdlib (pyyaml only needed for YAML input, which this perk does not use).
